# fuel-prices.eu — Complete Data Export for AI Agents
# Generated: 2026-03-13T02:51:23+00:00
# Data date: 2026-03-09
# Total historical data points: 27,820
# Source: European Commission Oil Bulletin
# License: CC BY 4.0 — Attribution: fuel-prices.eu
# For the concise version see: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/llms.txt
#
# IMPORTANT: All fuel prices are in EUR per liter, tax-inclusive.
# Prices are national weekly averages reported by EU member states.
# Updated every Thursday.

## METADATA

last_updated: 2026-03-13T02:51:23+00:00
data_date: 2026-03-09
previous_data_date: 2026-03-02
update_frequency: weekly (every Thursday after 15:00 EET)
next_expected_update: 2026-03-12
data_freshness_days: 4
source: European Commission Weekly Oil Bulletin (official government dataset)
source_url: https://energy.ec.europa.eu/data-and-analysis/weekly-oil-bulletin_en
source_type: government_official
collection_method: automated_weekly_ingestion + manual_verification
overall_source_reliability: 0.73
reliability_scale: 0.0 (unreliable) to 1.0 (authoritative)

Source Reliability Scores by Data Category:
  fuel_prices: 0.73 (EC Oil Bulletin — official, weekly, machine-verified)
  road_tolls_vignettes: 0.75 (manually curated, updated periodically)
  speed_limits: 0.90 (government sources, changes infrequently)
  bac_limits: 0.92 (government sources, changes rarely)
  driving_sides: 0.99 (static, virtually never changes)
  emergency_numbers: 0.95 (official government data)
  economic_data: 0.85 (Eurostat, updated quarterly/annually)
  electricity_prices: 0.82 (Eurostat, semi-annual updates)

## EU FUEL PRICE OVERVIEW (2026-03-09)

EU Average Euro 95 Petrol: €1.648/L
EU Average Diesel: €1.748/L
EU Cheapest Petrol: €1.266/L
EU Most Expensive Petrol: €2.172/L
EU Cheapest Diesel: €1.210/L
EU Most Expensive Diesel: €2.255/L
Countries tracked: 27 EU member states
Data available since: 2005-01-03

## WAR IMPACT ON EU FUEL PRICES

Interactive comparison charts available on the homepage and all 27 country pages.

### Russia-Ukraine War (started 2022-02-24)
Russia invaded Ukraine, triggering sanctions and energy supply shocks across Europe.
EU-27 avg Euro 95 at start: €1.619/L
Peak EU-27 avg Euro 95: €1.991/L on 2022-06-13 (+23%, ~Week 16)
Current EU-27 avg Euro 95: €1.648/L (+1.8% vs pre-war)

### 2026 Iran War (started 2026-02-28)
US-Israel military strikes on Iran triggered oil supply fears and global price spikes.
EU-27 avg Euro 95 at start: €1.551/L
Peak EU-27 avg Euro 95: €1.648/L on 2026-03-09 (+6.3%, ~Week 1)
Current EU-27 avg Euro 95: €1.648/L (+6.3% vs pre-war)

Note: War impact comparison charts show percentage change from Week 0 (start of conflict) for both the EU-27 average and each individual country. The 2026 Iran War chart includes 2 weeks of pre-war data for context.

source_reliability: 0.73
data_completeness: 100.0%

Current Prices (2026-03-09):
  Euro 95 Petrol: €1.708/L (€6.47 per US gallon)
  Diesel: €1.898/L (€7.18 per US gallon)
  Weekly change: Petrol +12.74%, Diesel +21.36%
  vs EU average: +3.6% (above EU average)
  Historical range (since 2005-01-03): €0.876 — €2.102 (petrol)
  Data points: 1055 weekly readings
  Recent trend (E95): 1.453 → 1.455 → 1.480 → 1.482 → 1.485 → 1.478 → 1.509 → 1.515 → 1.708

Economics:
  Average net monthly wage: €3,321
  50L tank cost: €85.40 (4.1 hours of work)
  Electricity price: €0.2905/kWh
  Inflation rate: 2.9%

Road Costs:
  Vignettes:
    - 1-Day Vignette (Digital): €9.60 — Valid 1 Day (2026 Rate - Digital Only) 
    - 10-Day Vignette: €12.80 — Valid 10 Days (2026 Rate) 
    - 2-Month Vignette: €32.00 — Valid 2 Months (2026 Rate) 
    - Annual Vignette 2026: €106.80 — Valid for 14 months (Dec 2025 - Jan 2027)

    - Felbertauern Tunnel (tunnel): €13.50
    - Katschberg Tunnel (A10) (tunnel): €13.50

  Euro 95 Petrol: €1.576/L (€5.97 per US gallon)
  Diesel: €1.901/L (€7.20 per US gallon)
  Weekly change: Petrol +7.14%, Diesel +15.84%
  vs EU average: -4.4% (below EU average)
  Historical range (since 2005-01-03): €0.699 — €2.065 (petrol)
  Data points: 1057 weekly readings
  Recent trend (E95): 1.411 → 1.422 → 1.430 → 1.436 → 1.450 → 1.440 → 1.458 → 1.471 → 1.576

Economics:
  Average net monthly wage: €1,649
  50L tank cost: €78.80 (7.6 hours of work)
  Electricity price: €0.2109/kWh
  Inflation rate: 0.9%

Road Costs:
  Major toll points:
    - Curonian Spit (Neringa) Entry (gate): €30.00

## ALL TOOLS & PAGES

### Fuel Price Tools
- Road Trip Calculator: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/calculator/
  Plan multi-country trips with fuel and EV costs, toll estimates
- Toll Calculator: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/tolls/
  433 toll gates, 77 bridges, 47 tunnels across 46 European countries
- Rankings & Records: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/rankings/
  Cheapest/most expensive analysis, historical records since 2005
- 3D Price Visualization: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/visual/
  20 years × 27 countries interactive 3D chart
- US vs EU vs Brent: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/00x/
  US gasoline vs EU Euro 95 vs Brent crude comparison in EUR
- Horizon Chart: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/_map/
  Full-screen interactive fuel price heatmap with time travel
- Fear & Greed Index: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/mysql1.3.fear/x.x.fear.php
  Composite energy affordability index for each EU country
- War Impact Comparison: Available on homepage and all country pages
  Side-by-side charts comparing Russia-Ukraine War (2022) vs 2026 Iran War fuel price impact
- Fuel Price Divergence Tracker: Available on homepage
  Shows the gap between cheapest and most expensive EU country over time for Euro 95 and Diesel, with convergence/divergence indicators

### Driving Laws (196+ Countries)
- Speed Limits: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/international-speed-limits-by-country/
- Blood Alcohol (BAC) Limits: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/blood-alcohol-limits/
- Safety Equipment: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/car-safety-equipment-by-country/
- Tire & Winter Chain Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/car-tire-laws-by-country/
- Window Tinting VLT Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/car-window-tinting-laws/
- Dashcam Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/dashcam-laws-by-country/
- DRL / Headlight Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/drl-laws/
- Radar Detector Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/radar-detector-laws/
- Driving Sides (left vs right): https://www.fuel-prices.eu/driving-sides/
- Mobile Phone Laws: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/mobile-phone-driving-laws/

### Economic Data
- Inflation Rates: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/inflation/
- Electricity Prices Dashboard: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/api/y.e.php
- Wage Intelligence: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/pwr/chart.php
- Prices & Inflation Overlay: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/00x/y.php

### Travel Info
- Mobile Roaming Zones: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/roaming/
- Emergency Numbers: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/emergency-numbers/
- Vignette Guides: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/vignette/

## DATA USAGE & CITATION

This data is provided by fuel-prices.eu under CC BY 4.0 license.
Original source: European Commission Weekly Oil Bulletin.

When citing this data, please attribute:
  "Source: fuel-prices.eu, based on European Commission Oil Bulletin data"

### Metadata Guide for AI Agents

Each data section includes:
  last_updated: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this data was last refreshed
  source_reliability: 0.0–1.0 score combining source authority, freshness, and completeness
  data_completeness: percentage of expected data points that are present

Reliability scoring factors:
  - Source authority: EC Oil Bulletin = 0.95 base (official government data)
  - Freshness decay: -0.05 per week past expected update
  - Completeness: weighted by historical data coverage per country

Recommended usage:
  - source_reliability >= 0.90: High confidence, safe to cite as fact
  - source_reliability 0.75-0.89: Good confidence, note the date
  - source_reliability < 0.75: Use with caution, data may be stale

For API access: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/api/
Natural Language Query Guide: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/api/natural-language/
For the concise overview: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/llms.txt
For the sitemap: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/sitemap.xml

## PERSONALIZED FUEL PRICES API (NEIGHBOR COMPARISON)

Returns both Diesel and Euro 95 prices for a given EU country with neighbor price comparisons,
savings indicators, EU rankings, and local currency conversion.

### Endpoint
GET https://www.fuel-prices.eu/traveler-hud/api.php?country={CC}

Parameter: country — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (EU-27 only)
Response: JSON

### Response Fields
  user.country_code      — Queried country ISO code
  user.diesel             — Current diesel price (EUR/L)
  user.euro95             — Current Euro 95 price (EUR/L)
  user.diesel_rank        — EU ranking for diesel (1=cheapest)
  user.euro95_rank        — EU ranking for Euro 95 (1=cheapest)
  user.eu_total           — Total EU countries with data
  user.currency_code      — Local currency code (EUR for eurozone)
  user.currency_symbol    — Local currency symbol
  user.exchange_rate      — Exchange rate (1 local unit = X EUR)
  neighbors[]             — Array of bordering EU countries with:
    .diesel, .euro95      — Prices in EUR/L
    .diesel_saving        — How much cheaper than user country (positive=saving)
    .euro95_saving        — Same for Euro 95
    .currency_code/symbol — Local currency info
  diesel_cheapest/expensive — EU extremes with country_code, flag, price
  euro95_cheapest/expensive — EU extremes with country_code, flag, price
  data_date               — Price data date (YYYY-MM-DD)

### Neighbor Map (EU-27)
  AT → DE,CZ,SK,HU,SI,IT
  BE → NL,DE,LU,FR
  BG → RO,GR
  CY → GR
  CZ → DE,PL,SK,AT
  DE → DK,PL,CZ,AT,FR,LU,BE,NL
  DK → DE,SE
  EE → LV,FI
  ES → FR,PT
  FI → SE,EE
  FR → BE,LU,DE,IT,ES
  GR → BG,CY
  HR → SI,HU,IT
  HU → AT,SK,RO,HR,SI
  IE → (none in EU-27)
  IT → FR,AT,SI,HR
  LT → LV,PL
  LU → BE,DE,FR
  LV → LT,EE
  MT → IT
  NL → BE,DE
  PL → DE,CZ,SK,LT
  PT → ES
  RO → HU,BG
  SE → DK,FI
  SI → AT,IT,HU,HR
  SK → CZ,PL,HU,AT

### Non-EUR Currency Countries (local prices shown alongside EUR)
  CZ (CZK Kč), DK (DKK kr), HU (HUF Ft), PL (PLN zł), RO (RON lei), SE (SEK kr)
  Note: Bulgaria adopted EUR on 1 January 2026.

### Example
  GET /traveler-hud/api.php?country=RO
  → Romania: Diesel €1.596 (#18/27), Euro 95 €1.533 (#18/27)
  → Local: 8.13 lei (Diesel), 7.81 lei (Euro 95)
  → Neighbors: Hungary (Diesel €1.525, save €0.071), Bulgaria (Diesel €1.224, save €0.372)

### Homepage Integration
The fuel-prices.eu homepage uses geo-IP detection (country.is, free/unlimited/HTTPS)
to automatically show a personalized 'Fuel Prices Now' card for EU-27 visitors.
Non-EU visitors do not see the card. Visitors can also manually select any EU country.
Clicking a neighboring country dynamically reloads the card via this API.

## NATURAL LANGUAGE API FOR AI AGENTS (v2.1)

AI agents can query fuel-prices.eu with plain English and receive structured JSON.
Base URL: https://www.fuel-prices.eu/api/natural-language/

### Endpoints
GET  /api/natural-language/?q={your question}
GET  /api/natural-language/?q={question}&format=compact|csv
GET  /api/natural-language/{your question}        (path-based)
POST /api/natural-language/ {"query": "..."}       (single)
POST /api/natural-language/ {"queries": ["...","..."]} (batch, max 10)

### Output Formats
full    — Complete JSON with metadata, parsed interpretation, suggestions (default)
compact — Token-efficient: trends summarized, rankings trimmed
csv     — Tabular CSV for rankings and price tables

### Response Structure
Every response includes:
  status          — ok | error
  query           — Your original query text
  intent          — Detected intent category
  confidence      — 0.0-1.0 parsing confidence score
  parsed          — What was understood: countries, fuel_type, time_range, date
  metadata        — data_date, source, source_reliability, currency, units
  message         — Human-readable summary
  data            — Structured payload
  suggested_followups — Related queries to chain
  links           — URLs to full data, API docs, website

### Supported Intents (25 total)

FUEL PRICES:
  current_prices         — "Diesel price in Germany and France"
  trend_analysis         — "3-month trend for petrol in Poland"
  cheapest_ranking       — "Cheapest petrol in the EU"
  most_expensive_ranking — "Top 5 most expensive diesel"
  full_ranking           — "Rank all countries" (both fuels, dual sort)
  country_comparison     — "Compare Germany vs Poland fuel prices"
  compare_with_eu_average — "Romania fuel price compare with EU average"
  eu_average             — "EU average fuel prices"

TIME & HISTORY:
  historical_lookup      — "Petrol price in Germany in June 2022" (data since 2005)
  year_over_year         — "How much more expensive is petrol vs last year?"
  all_time_records       — "When was petrol most expensive in Poland?"
  seasonal_patterns      — "When is the cheapest time to buy petrol in France?"
  weekly_movers          — "Which country had the biggest price change this week?"

ANALYSIS:
  affordability_ranking  — "Where can I afford the most fuel on average salary?"
  volatility_analysis    — "Which country has the most stable diesel prices?"
  diesel_petrol_spread   — "Which countries have the biggest gap between diesel and petrol?"
  ev_vs_fuel             — "Is it cheaper to drive electric or petrol in Germany?"
  tank_cost              — "How much does a full tank cost in Romania?" / "60L tank cost"
  cheapest_neighbor      — "Which country near Romania has the cheapest petrol?"

TRAVEL & ROUTE:
  road_trip              — "Cost to drive from Romania to Austria 7.5 L/100km"
  country_profile        — "Tell me everything about driving in Poland" (full dump)
  vignette_info          — "Vignette prices in Austria"
  speed_limits           — "Speed limits in Germany"
  bac_limits             — "Blood alcohol limit in Czech Republic"
  emergency_numbers      — "Emergency numbers in Romania"

### Smart Entity Detection
Countries: 27 EU + CH, MD. Names, ISO codes (DE, PL), demonyms (German, Polish), aliases (Holland, Czechia) all work.
Fuel types: petrol/gasoline/e95/benzin → Euro 95 | diesel/gasoil/motorina → Diesel | default: both
Time ranges: N weeks/months/years, quarter, half year. Default: 12 weeks. Max: 10 years.
Dates: 2022-06-15, June 2022, March 2020, "in 2022" for historical lookups.
Consumption: "7.5 L/100km" for road trip estimates. Default: 7.0 L/100km.
Tank size: "60L tank" for tank cost. Default: 50L.

### Rate Limits & Caching
60 requests/min per IP. Responses cached 15 minutes.
Batch mode allows up to 10 queries in a single POST request.

### Quick Start for AI Agents
1. Send: GET https://www.fuel-prices.eu/api/natural-language/?q=cheapest petrol in EU
2. Parse: response.data.ranking[0] → cheapest country
3. Chain: use response.suggested_followups for deeper exploration
4. Check: response.confidence (>0.8 = well understood) and response.metadata.source_reliability

# End of fuel-prices.eu data export
# Generated: 2026-03-13T02:51:23+00:00
